## 类型 / Type

- [ ] 🐛 Bug
- [ ] 💡 功能建议 / Feature request

> ⚠️ Pounce 当前处于维护模式：Bug 会修，功能建议会被记录但不保证采纳。
> Pounce is in maintenance mode — bug fixes only; feature suggestions are welcome but not guaranteed.
